title: Gooey Greek Sea Bass Stir-fry
description: A fermented and gooey mediterranean dish featuring sea bass with a touch of Mediterranean flair.
instructions: Season the sea bass with salt and black pepper on both sides. Spread olive oil over the fish, then place it in a baking dish.
In a small bowl, mix vinegar, thyme leaves, salt, and pepper. Brush this mixture evenly over the top of each fish fillet.
Bake for 15 minutes or until fish is cooked through (internal temperature should be at least 145°F).
While the sea bass bakes, sauté chopped onion in a pan with olive oil over medium heat until softened and translucent. Add minced garlic, cook for another minute.
Stir-fry the sea bass gently with the onions and garlic for an additional 2-3 minutes to meld flavors together, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan.
Remove from heat immediately upon completion of stir-frying to prevent burning.
